# Tour Kit v0.3.0 — Generated 2026-03-24T02:58:52Z

# Tour Kit

> Tour Kit is a headless onboarding and product tour library for React. It provides sequential guided tours, persistent hints, onboarding checklists, product announcements, media embeds, feature adoption tracking, analytics integration, and time-based scheduling. All components are accessible (WCAG 2.1 AA), keyboard-navigable, and work with Next.js and Vite.

## Getting Started

- [Getting Started](https://tour-kit-docs.vercel.app/docs/getting-started): Learn how to install and set up Tour Kit in your React application.
- [Installation](https://tour-kit-docs.vercel.app/docs/getting-started/installation): Install TourKit in your React project
- [Quick Start](https://tour-kit-docs.vercel.app/docs/getting-started/quick-start): Get up and running with TourKit in 5 minutes
- [TypeScript](https://tour-kit-docs.vercel.app/docs/getting-started/typescript): TypeScript configuration and type usage

## Core

- [@tour-kit/core](https://tour-kit-docs.vercel.app/docs/core): Headless hooks and utilities for building product tours
- [useAdvanceOn](https://tour-kit-docs.vercel.app/docs/core/hooks/use-advance-on): Automatically advance tour when users interact with elements
- [useBranch](https://tour-kit-docs.vercel.app/docs/core/hooks/use-branch): Hook for triggering branch actions from step content
- [useElementPosition](https://tour-kit-docs.vercel.app/docs/core/hooks/use-element-position): Track element position with automatic updates on scroll and resize
- [useFocusTrap](https://tour-kit-docs.vercel.app/docs/core/hooks/use-focus-trap): Hook for trapping focus within tour elements
- [useKeyboard](https://tour-kit-docs.vercel.app/docs/core/hooks/use-keyboard): Hook for keyboard navigation
- [useMediaQuery](https://tour-kit-docs.vercel.app/docs/core/hooks/use-media-query): Reactive media query hooks for responsive and accessible tours
- [usePersistence](https://tour-kit-docs.vercel.app/docs/core/hooks/use-persistence): Hook for persisting tour state
- [useRoutePersistence](https://tour-kit-docs.vercel.app/docs/core/hooks/use-route-persistence): Persist tour state across page navigations for multi-page tours
- [useSpotlight](https://tour-kit-docs.vercel.app/docs/core/hooks/use-spotlight): Hook for spotlight overlay control
- [useStep](https://tour-kit-docs.vercel.app/docs/core/hooks/use-step): Hook for accessing current step data
- [useTour](https://tour-kit-docs.vercel.app/docs/core/hooks/use-tour): Main hook for controlling tours
- [TourKitProvider](https://tour-kit-docs.vercel.app/docs/core/providers/tour-kit-provider): Global provider for managing multiple tours
- [TourProvider](https://tour-kit-docs.vercel.app/docs/core/providers/tour-provider): Context provider for individual tours
- [Config Types](https://tour-kit-docs.vercel.app/docs/core/types/config-types): TypeScript types for configuration options
- [Step Types](https://tour-kit-docs.vercel.app/docs/core/types/step-types): TypeScript types for tour steps
- [Tour Types](https://tour-kit-docs.vercel.app/docs/core/types/tour-types): TypeScript types for tour configuration
- [Accessibility Utilities](https://tour-kit-docs.vercel.app/docs/core/utilities/a11y): Screen reader announcements and accessibility helpers
- [createStep](https://tour-kit-docs.vercel.app/docs/core/utilities/create-step): Factory function for creating typed step configurations
- [createTour](https://tour-kit-docs.vercel.app/docs/core/utilities/create-tour): Factory function for creating typed tour configurations
- [DOM Utilities](https://tour-kit-docs.vercel.app/docs/core/utilities/dom): DOM manipulation and element tracking utilities
- [Helper Functions](https://tour-kit-docs.vercel.app/docs/core/utilities/helpers): Utility functions for common tour operations
- [Logger Utility](https://tour-kit-docs.vercel.app/docs/core/utilities/logger): Configurable logging for debugging and production
- [Position Utilities](https://tour-kit-docs.vercel.app/docs/core/utilities/position): Calculate tooltip positions with collision detection and RTL support
- [Scroll Utilities](https://tour-kit-docs.vercel.app/docs/core/utilities/scroll): Smooth scrolling and scroll lock utilities
- [Storage Utilities](https://tour-kit-docs.vercel.app/docs/core/utilities/storage): Storage adapters for persisting tour state
- [Throttle Utilities](https://tour-kit-docs.vercel.app/docs/core/utilities/throttle): Performance utilities for rate-limiting function calls

## React

- [@tour-kit/react](https://tour-kit-docs.vercel.app/docs/react): Pre-styled React components for product tours
- [Router Adapters](https://tour-kit-docs.vercel.app/docs/react/adapters): Framework-specific router adapters for multi-page tours
- [Next.js App Router Adapter](https://tour-kit-docs.vercel.app/docs/react/adapters/next-app-router): Router adapter for Next.js 13+ App Router
- [Next.js Pages Router Adapter](https://tour-kit-docs.vercel.app/docs/react/adapters/next-pages-router): Router adapter for Next.js Pages Router
- [React Router Adapter](https://tour-kit-docs.vercel.app/docs/react/adapters/react-router): Router adapter for React Router v6 and v7
- [Tour](https://tour-kit-docs.vercel.app/docs/react/components/tour): Main tour wrapper component
- [TourCard](https://tour-kit-docs.vercel.app/docs/react/components/tour-card): Tooltip card component for tour steps
- [TourClose](https://tour-kit-docs.vercel.app/docs/react/components/tour-close): Close button for dismissing the tour
- [TourNavigation](https://tour-kit-docs.vercel.app/docs/react/components/tour-navigation): Navigation buttons for tour steps
- [TourOverlay](https://tour-kit-docs.vercel.app/docs/react/components/tour-overlay): Spotlight overlay component
- [TourProgress](https://tour-kit-docs.vercel.app/docs/react/components/tour-progress): Progress indicator for tour steps
- [TourStep](https://tour-kit-docs.vercel.app/docs/react/components/tour-step): Define individual tour steps
- [Headless Components](https://tour-kit-docs.vercel.app/docs/react/headless): Unstyled components for complete customization
- [Headless Examples](https://tour-kit-docs.vercel.app/docs/react/headless/examples): Advanced examples for building custom tour UIs with headless components
- [HeadlessTourCard](https://tour-kit-docs.vercel.app/docs/react/headless/headless-card): Unstyled tour card component
- [HeadlessTourOverlay](https://tour-kit-docs.vercel.app/docs/react/headless/headless-overlay): Unstyled spotlight overlay component
- [useTourRoute](https://tour-kit-docs.vercel.app/docs/react/hooks/use-tour-route): Route-aware tour control for multi-page tours
- [useTours](https://tour-kit-docs.vercel.app/docs/react/hooks/use-tours): Access all registered tours and their state
- [MultiTourKitProvider](https://tour-kit-docs.vercel.app/docs/react/providers/multi-tour-kit-provider): Provider for managing multiple tours with shared configuration
- [CSS Variables](https://tour-kit-docs.vercel.app/docs/react/styling/css-variables): Customize TourKit with CSS variables
- [Custom Components](https://tour-kit-docs.vercel.app/docs/react/styling/custom-components): Build your own tour components
- [Tailwind CSS](https://tour-kit-docs.vercel.app/docs/react/styling/tailwind): Using TourKit with Tailwind CSS

## Hints

- [@tour-kit/hints](https://tour-kit-docs.vercel.app/docs/hints): Persistent hints and hotspots for feature discovery
- [Components](https://tour-kit-docs.vercel.app/docs/hints/components): Hint, HintHotspot, and HintTooltip components for contextual feature discovery
- [Headless Hints](https://tour-kit-docs.vercel.app/docs/hints/headless): Build custom hint UIs with headless components
- [HintHeadless](https://tour-kit-docs.vercel.app/docs/hints/headless/hint-headless): Headless hint component with render props for custom UIs
- [HintHotspotHeadless](https://tour-kit-docs.vercel.app/docs/hints/headless/hint-hotspot-headless): Headless hotspot component for custom trigger buttons
- [HintTooltipHeadless](https://tour-kit-docs.vercel.app/docs/hints/headless/hint-tooltip-headless): Headless floating tooltip with positioning logic
- [Hooks](https://tour-kit-docs.vercel.app/docs/hints/hooks): useHints and useHint hooks for programmatic hint control
- [Persistence](https://tour-kit-docs.vercel.app/docs/hints/persistence): Understanding hint dismissal patterns and persisting state across sessions

## Adoption

- [Feature Adoption Tracking](https://tour-kit-docs.vercel.app/docs/adoption): Track feature usage, measure adoption, and nudge users toward valuable features
- [Analytics Integration](https://tour-kit-docs.vercel.app/docs/adoption/analytics): Automatic analytics tracking for adoption events
- [AdoptionNudge](https://tour-kit-docs.vercel.app/docs/adoption/components/adoption-nudge): Auto-showing nudge component for feature discovery
- [Conditional Components](https://tour-kit-docs.vercel.app/docs/adoption/components/conditional): IfNotAdopted and IfAdopted - render based on adoption status
- [FeatureButton](https://tour-kit-docs.vercel.app/docs/adoption/components/feature-button): Button with automatic usage tracking
- [NewFeatureBadge](https://tour-kit-docs.vercel.app/docs/adoption/components/new-feature-badge): Badge component that shows for unadopted features
- [Dashboard Components](https://tour-kit-docs.vercel.app/docs/adoption/dashboard): Pre-built admin dashboard components for visualizing adoption metrics
- [AdoptionDashboard](https://tour-kit-docs.vercel.app/docs/adoption/dashboard/adoption-dashboard): Complete admin dashboard with all adoption metrics
- [Charts](https://tour-kit-docs.vercel.app/docs/adoption/dashboard/charts): AdoptionCategoryChart and AdoptionStatusBadge components
- [Stat Cards](https://tour-kit-docs.vercel.app/docs/adoption/dashboard/stats): AdoptionStatCard and AdoptionStatsGrid components
- [AdoptionTable](https://tour-kit-docs.vercel.app/docs/adoption/dashboard/table): Sortable table of features and adoption status
- [useAdoptionStats](https://tour-kit-docs.vercel.app/docs/adoption/hooks/use-adoption-stats): Get aggregated adoption metrics across all features
- [useFeature](https://tour-kit-docs.vercel.app/docs/adoption/hooks/use-feature): Track and query individual feature adoption state
- [useNudge](https://tour-kit-docs.vercel.app/docs/adoption/hooks/use-nudge): Manage nudge state and handle user interactions
- [AdoptionProvider](https://tour-kit-docs.vercel.app/docs/adoption/providers/adoption-provider): Configure feature tracking, storage, and nudge behavior
- [TypeScript Types](https://tour-kit-docs.vercel.app/docs/adoption/types): Type definitions for @tour-kit/adoption

## Analytics

- [Analytics](https://tour-kit-docs.vercel.app/docs/analytics): Plugin-based analytics integration for tracking tour and hint events
- [Analytics Hooks](https://tour-kit-docs.vercel.app/docs/analytics/hooks): React hooks for accessing the analytics tracker in components
- [Analytics Plugins](https://tour-kit-docs.vercel.app/docs/analytics/plugins): Overview of the plugin system and available integrations
- [Amplitude Plugin](https://tour-kit-docs.vercel.app/docs/analytics/plugins/amplitude): Integrate tour analytics with Amplitude product intelligence
- [Console Plugin](https://tour-kit-docs.vercel.app/docs/analytics/plugins/console): Debug analytics events with colored console output
- [Custom Analytics Plugins](https://tour-kit-docs.vercel.app/docs/analytics/plugins/custom): Build your own analytics integrations with the plugin API
- [Google Analytics Plugin](https://tour-kit-docs.vercel.app/docs/analytics/plugins/google-analytics): Integrate tour analytics with Google Analytics 4
- [Mixpanel Plugin](https://tour-kit-docs.vercel.app/docs/analytics/plugins/mixpanel): Integrate tour analytics with Mixpanel event tracking
- [PostHog Plugin](https://tour-kit-docs.vercel.app/docs/analytics/plugins/posthog): Integrate tour analytics with PostHog product analytics
- [AnalyticsProvider](https://tour-kit-docs.vercel.app/docs/analytics/providers): React provider for configuring tour analytics tracking
- [Analytics Types](https://tour-kit-docs.vercel.app/docs/analytics/types): TypeScript type definitions for the analytics package

## Announcements

- [@tour-kit/announcements](https://tour-kit-docs.vercel.app/docs/announcements): Product announcements with 5 UI variants, priority queuing, and audience targeting
- [Components](https://tour-kit-docs.vercel.app/docs/announcements/components): Pre-styled announcement components for all UI variants
- [AnnouncementBanner](https://tour-kit-docs.vercel.app/docs/announcements/components/banner): Full-width bar component for persistent notices
- [AnnouncementModal](https://tour-kit-docs.vercel.app/docs/announcements/components/modal): Centered dialog component for important announcements
- [AnnouncementSlideout](https://tour-kit-docs.vercel.app/docs/announcements/components/slideout): Side panel component for detailed announcements
- [AnnouncementSpotlight](https://tour-kit-docs.vercel.app/docs/announcements/components/spotlight): Element highlight component for contextual announcements
- [AnnouncementToast](https://tour-kit-docs.vercel.app/docs/announcements/components/toast): Temporary notification component for quick messages
- [Audience Targeting](https://tour-kit-docs.vercel.app/docs/announcements/configuration/audience): Show announcements to specific user segments
- [Frequency Rules](https://tour-kit-docs.vercel.app/docs/announcements/configuration/frequency): Control how often announcements are shown to users
- [Queue Management](https://tour-kit-docs.vercel.app/docs/announcements/configuration/queue): Priority-based announcement queue with automatic scheduling
- [Headless Components](https://tour-kit-docs.vercel.app/docs/announcements/headless): Build custom announcement UI with render props
- [HeadlessBanner](https://tour-kit-docs.vercel.app/docs/announcements/headless/banner): Headless banner component with render props
- [HeadlessModal](https://tour-kit-docs.vercel.app/docs/announcements/headless/modal): Headless modal component with render props
- [HeadlessSlideout](https://tour-kit-docs.vercel.app/docs/announcements/headless/slideout): Headless slideout component with render props
- [HeadlessSpotlight](https://tour-kit-docs.vercel.app/docs/announcements/headless/spotlight): Headless spotlight component with render props
- [HeadlessToast](https://tour-kit-docs.vercel.app/docs/announcements/headless/toast): Headless toast component with render props
- [useAnnouncement](https://tour-kit-docs.vercel.app/docs/announcements/hooks/use-announcement): Hook for controlling a single announcement
- [useAnnouncementQueue](https://tour-kit-docs.vercel.app/docs/announcements/hooks/use-announcement-queue): Hook for managing the announcement queue
- [useAnnouncements](https://tour-kit-docs.vercel.app/docs/announcements/hooks/use-announcements): Hook for accessing and managing all announcements
- [AnnouncementsProvider](https://tour-kit-docs.vercel.app/docs/announcements/providers/announcements-provider): Root provider for announcement state and configuration
- [Type Reference](https://tour-kit-docs.vercel.app/docs/announcements/types): Complete TypeScript type reference for @tour-kit/announcements

## Checklists

- [@tour-kit/checklists](https://tour-kit-docs.vercel.app/docs/checklists): Interactive checklists with task dependencies and progress tracking
- [Components](https://tour-kit-docs.vercel.app/docs/checklists/components): Pre-styled checklist components with shadcn/ui patterns
- [Checklist](https://tour-kit-docs.vercel.app/docs/checklists/components/checklist): Main checklist container component
- [ChecklistLauncher](https://tour-kit-docs.vercel.app/docs/checklists/components/checklist-launcher): Floating button to toggle checklist panel visibility
- [ChecklistPanel](https://tour-kit-docs.vercel.app/docs/checklists/components/checklist-panel): Floating panel container for checklists
- [ChecklistProgress](https://tour-kit-docs.vercel.app/docs/checklists/components/checklist-progress): Progress bar component for checklists
- [ChecklistTask](https://tour-kit-docs.vercel.app/docs/checklists/components/checklist-task): Individual task item component
- [Headless Components](https://tour-kit-docs.vercel.app/docs/checklists/headless): Unstyled components with render props for custom UIs
- [ChecklistHeadless](https://tour-kit-docs.vercel.app/docs/checklists/headless/checklist-headless): Headless checklist component with render props
- [TaskHeadless](https://tour-kit-docs.vercel.app/docs/checklists/headless/task-headless): Headless task component with render props
- [useChecklist](https://tour-kit-docs.vercel.app/docs/checklists/hooks/use-checklist): Main hook for controlling checklist state and actions
- [useChecklistPersistence](https://tour-kit-docs.vercel.app/docs/checklists/hooks/use-checklist-persistence): Manage checklist state persistence across sessions
- [useChecklistsProgress](https://tour-kit-docs.vercel.app/docs/checklists/hooks/use-checklists-progress): Get aggregated progress across all checklists
- [useTask](https://tour-kit-docs.vercel.app/docs/checklists/hooks/use-task): Hook for controlling individual tasks
- [ChecklistProvider](https://tour-kit-docs.vercel.app/docs/checklists/providers/checklist-provider): Configure and provide checklist state to your application
- [Types](https://tour-kit-docs.vercel.app/docs/checklists/types): TypeScript type definitions for checklists
- [Utilities](https://tour-kit-docs.vercel.app/docs/checklists/utilities): Helper functions for checklists and tasks
- [createChecklist & createTask](https://tour-kit-docs.vercel.app/docs/checklists/utilities/create-checklist): Factory functions for type-safe checklist creation
- [Dependency Utilities](https://tour-kit-docs.vercel.app/docs/checklists/utilities/dependencies): Functions for managing task dependencies
- [Progress Utilities](https://tour-kit-docs.vercel.app/docs/checklists/utilities/progress): Functions for calculating and analyzing progress

## Media

- [Media](https://tour-kit-docs.vercel.app/docs/media): Embedded video and media support for tours and announcements with auto-detection and accessibility features
- [GifPlayer](https://tour-kit-docs.vercel.app/docs/media/components/gif-player): Animated GIF player with play/pause controls and accessibility features
- [LoomEmbed](https://tour-kit-docs.vercel.app/docs/media/components/loom-embed): Embed Loom screen recordings and async video messages in your tours
- [LottiePlayer](https://tour-kit-docs.vercel.app/docs/media/components/lottie-player): Lightweight vector animation player with Lottie support
- [NativeVideo](https://tour-kit-docs.vercel.app/docs/media/components/native-video): Self-hosted HTML5 video with captions, responsive sources, and accessibility features
- [TourMedia](https://tour-kit-docs.vercel.app/docs/media/components/tour-media): Main media component with automatic platform detection and accessibility features
- [VimeoEmbed](https://tour-kit-docs.vercel.app/docs/media/components/vimeo-embed): Embed Vimeo videos with professional privacy controls and customization
- [WistiaEmbed](https://tour-kit-docs.vercel.app/docs/media/components/wistia-embed): Embed Wistia videos with enterprise features and advanced analytics
- [YouTubeEmbed](https://tour-kit-docs.vercel.app/docs/media/components/youtube-embed): Embed YouTube videos with GDPR-compliant privacy-enhanced mode
- [Headless API](https://tour-kit-docs.vercel.app/docs/media/headless): Build completely custom media interfaces with full programmatic control
- [MediaHeadless](https://tour-kit-docs.vercel.app/docs/media/headless/media-headless): Headless media component with render props for complete UI control
- [useMediaEvents](https://tour-kit-docs.vercel.app/docs/media/hooks/use-media-events): Track media engagement and integrate with analytics platforms
- [usePrefersReducedMotion](https://tour-kit-docs.vercel.app/docs/media/hooks/use-prefers-reduced-motion): Detect user motion preferences for accessible animations
- [useResponsiveSource](https://tour-kit-docs.vercel.app/docs/media/hooks/use-responsive-source): Select media sources based on viewport size for optimized delivery
- [Type Reference](https://tour-kit-docs.vercel.app/docs/media/types): Complete TypeScript type definitions for @tour-kit/media
- [Embed URLs](https://tour-kit-docs.vercel.app/docs/media/utilities/embed-urls): Build privacy-compliant embed URLs for video platforms
- [URL Parsing](https://tour-kit-docs.vercel.app/docs/media/utilities/url-parsing): Detect media types and extract video IDs from URLs

## Scheduling

- [@tour-kit/scheduling](https://tour-kit-docs.vercel.app/docs/scheduling): Time-based scheduling utilities for controlling when tours and content should be shown
- [Scheduling Hooks](https://tour-kit-docs.vercel.app/docs/scheduling/hooks): React hooks for reactive schedule evaluation
- [useSchedule](https://tour-kit-docs.vercel.app/docs/scheduling/hooks/use-schedule): React hook for simple schedule active/inactive checks with auto-refresh
- [useScheduleStatus](https://tour-kit-docs.vercel.app/docs/scheduling/hooks/use-schedule-status): React hook for detailed schedule status with next active/inactive times
- [useUserTimezone](https://tour-kit-docs.vercel.app/docs/scheduling/hooks/use-user-timezone): React hook to get the user's browser timezone
- [Presets](https://tour-kit-docs.vercel.app/docs/scheduling/presets): Pre-configured constants and patterns for common scheduling scenarios
- [Types Reference](https://tour-kit-docs.vercel.app/docs/scheduling/types): TypeScript types for scheduling
- [Scheduling Utilities](https://tour-kit-docs.vercel.app/docs/scheduling/utilities): Pure functions for schedule evaluation and time handling
- [Blackout Utilities](https://tour-kit-docs.vercel.app/docs/scheduling/utilities/blackouts): Functions for checking blackout periods
- [Business Hours Utilities](https://tour-kit-docs.vercel.app/docs/scheduling/utilities/business-hours): Functions for checking business hours and holidays
- [Date Range Utilities](https://tour-kit-docs.vercel.app/docs/scheduling/utilities/date-range): Functions for checking date range constraints
- [Day of Week Utilities](https://tour-kit-docs.vercel.app/docs/scheduling/utilities/day-of-week): Functions for working with days of the week
- [Recurring Pattern Utilities](https://tour-kit-docs.vercel.app/docs/scheduling/utilities/recurring): Functions for matching recurring schedules
- [Schedule Evaluation](https://tour-kit-docs.vercel.app/docs/scheduling/utilities/schedule-evaluation): Core functions for evaluating schedule active status
- [Time Range Utilities](https://tour-kit-docs.vercel.app/docs/scheduling/utilities/time-range): Functions for checking time-of-day constraints
- [Timezone Utilities](https://tour-kit-docs.vercel.app/docs/scheduling/utilities/timezone): Functions for timezone detection, validation, and conversion

## AI

- [@tour-kit/ai](https://tour-kit-docs.vercel.app/docs/ai): AI-powered chat assistant for product tours with context-aware conversation
- [API Reference](https://tour-kit-docs.vercel.app/docs/ai/api-reference): Complete API reference for @tour-kit/ai client and server exports
- [CAG Guide](https://tour-kit-docs.vercel.app/docs/ai/cag-guide): Context-Augmented Generation — inject tour context directly into AI prompts
- [Components](https://tour-kit-docs.vercel.app/docs/ai/components): Pre-built UI components for AI chat features
- [Quick Start](https://tour-kit-docs.vercel.app/docs/ai/quick-start): Get up and running with @tour-kit/ai in under 5 minutes
- [RAG Guide](https://tour-kit-docs.vercel.app/docs/ai/rag-guide): Retrieval-Augmented Generation — vector search over documentation for scalable AI chat
- [Tour Integration](https://tour-kit-docs.vercel.app/docs/ai/tour-integration): Connect AI chat to active tours for context-aware assistance

## Guides

- [Guides](https://tour-kit-docs.vercel.app/docs/guides): In-depth guides for Tour Kit features and integrations
- [Accessibility](https://tour-kit-docs.vercel.app/docs/guides/accessibility): Building accessible tours that work for everyone - WCAG 2.1 AA compliance guide
- [Adoption Analytics](https://tour-kit-docs.vercel.app/docs/guides/adoption-analytics): Tracking feature adoption metrics with analytics integration
- [Analytics Integration](https://tour-kit-docs.vercel.app/docs/guides/analytics-integration): Integrating @tour-kit/analytics with tours, hints, checklists, and adoption tracking
- [Animations](https://tour-kit-docs.vercel.app/docs/guides/animations): Customize tour transitions, respect reduced motion, and create smooth experiences
- [Time-Based Announcements](https://tour-kit-docs.vercel.app/docs/guides/announcements-scheduling): Using scheduling with announcements for timed content delivery
- [Base UI Support](https://tour-kit-docs.vercel.app/docs/guides/base-ui): Use TourKit with Base UI instead of Radix UI
- [Branching Tours](https://tour-kit-docs.vercel.app/docs/guides/branching): Create personalized tour experiences with dynamic branching based on user choices
- [Checklists with Tours](https://tour-kit-docs.vercel.app/docs/guides/checklists-tours): Using checklists with tours for guided onboarding flows
- [Next.js Integration](https://tour-kit-docs.vercel.app/docs/guides/nextjs): Complete setup guide for Tour Kit with Next.js App Router and Pages Router
- [Persistence](https://tour-kit-docs.vercel.app/docs/guides/persistence): Save tour progress, checklist state, and user preferences across sessions
- [Router Integration](https://tour-kit-docs.vercel.app/docs/guides/router-integration): Set up multi-page tours with Next.js, React Router, and custom routers
- [Troubleshooting](https://tour-kit-docs.vercel.app/docs/guides/troubleshooting): Common issues and solutions when using Tour Kit
- [Vite Integration](https://tour-kit-docs.vercel.app/docs/guides/vite): Setup guide for Tour Kit with Vite and React

## Examples

- [Examples](https://tour-kit-docs.vercel.app/docs/examples): Real-world examples and copy-paste code for Tour Kit
- [Basic Tour](https://tour-kit-docs.vercel.app/docs/examples/basic-tour): A simple multi-step product tour with copy-paste code
- [Headless Custom UI](https://tour-kit-docs.vercel.app/docs/examples/headless-custom): Build a completely custom tour UI using headless components
- [Onboarding Flow](https://tour-kit-docs.vercel.app/docs/examples/onboarding-flow): A complete user onboarding flow with persistence and conditional steps

- [API Reference](https://tour-kit-docs.vercel.app/docs/api): Complete API documentation for all Tour Kit packages
- [@tour-kit/adoption API](https://tour-kit-docs.vercel.app/docs/api/adoption): Complete API reference for @tour-kit/adoption
- [@tour-kit/analytics API](https://tour-kit-docs.vercel.app/docs/api/analytics): Complete API reference for @tour-kit/analytics
- [@tour-kit/announcements API](https://tour-kit-docs.vercel.app/docs/api/announcements): Complete API reference for @tour-kit/announcements
- [@tour-kit/checklists API](https://tour-kit-docs.vercel.app/docs/api/checklists): Complete API reference for @tour-kit/checklists
- [@tour-kit/core API](https://tour-kit-docs.vercel.app/docs/api/core): Complete API reference for @tour-kit/core
- [@tour-kit/hints API](https://tour-kit-docs.vercel.app/docs/api/hints): Complete API reference for @tour-kit/hints
- [@tour-kit/media API](https://tour-kit-docs.vercel.app/docs/api/media): Complete API reference for @tour-kit/media
- [@tour-kit/react API](https://tour-kit-docs.vercel.app/docs/api/react): Complete API reference for @tour-kit/react
- [@tour-kit/scheduling API](https://tour-kit-docs.vercel.app/docs/api/scheduling): Complete API reference for @tour-kit/scheduling

## AI Assistants

- [AI Assistants](https://tour-kit-docs.vercel.app/docs/ai-assistants): Documentation resources optimized for AI coding assistants and LLMs

## Index

- [TourKit](https://tour-kit-docs.vercel.app/docs/index): The most developer-friendly, accessible product tour library for React
